rule_adherence.notes: Tokens-only styling, logical properties, every-layout primitives (Box/Center/Stack), and main-process-only dialog access via typed IPC are all respected.

simplicity.notes: Splitting EmptyState into NoFolderState/NoFileState and a try/catch around readDir is the minimal change the task needs, with no superfluous abstraction.

spec_compliance.notes: All AC met: no-folder affordance, distinct no-file state, empty-folder message, inline file-read error, folder-read error via showErrorBox keeping tree empty, and component tests per state.

visual_posture.notes: Empty/error surfaces composed via content-box → center with muted-text and accent tokens, consistent with the editor pane treatment.

summary: Clean, token-only consolidation of empty/error states with correct IPC-backed folder-error handling and per-state component tests; fully compliant.
